findings.problem: The narration repeatedly falls back on clipped fragment ladders and negation stair-steps ('Not unkindly. Not kindly either.' / 'Not panic. Not chaos.' / 'Cash in. Parts out.'). Because this construction recurs chapter-wide, it stops feeling like local emphasis and starts reading like a reusable house tic. It also conflicts with the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping in narration.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the fragment ladders at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:17, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:63, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:323, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:585, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:627, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:655, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:671 into grammatically complete sentences or materially different emphasis beats. Keep the compression, but vary the syntax so the pressure comes from image, cadence, or consequence rather than the same bare-fragment pattern every time.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:17, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:63, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:323, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:585, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:627, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:655, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:671 no longer rely on standalone clipped narration fragments such as 'Not X.' or bare noun tallies like 'Cash in. Parts out.', while preserving the same story information and emphasis by ordinary reading. FAIL if a read-through of the revised chapter still finds three or more narration beats using the same fragment-ladder construction.

summary: Chapter 3 lands its preparation engine cleanly: Jo's laundromat works as a vivid communal cover, the first run of clients establishes overlap symptoms through embodied repair work, and the ending convincingly turns Blue Hour from a one-off favor into a neighborhood address. Mira, Tavi, and Jo all track the style bible well, the comic-bodily mode stays committed without sanitizing injury, shame, debt, or intimacy pressure, and the chapter remains in tight past-tense close on Mira. The unresolved failure is sentence-level: the narration overuses clipped negation and noun-fragment ladders often enough to feel formulaic and constitution-breaking rather than sharp.
